test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bench_polygon_union (poly Polygon, group_id UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bench_polygon_union SELECT [[(toFloat64(number), 0.), (toFloat64(number + 2), 0.), (toFloat64(number + 2), 2.), (toFloat64(number), 2.), (toFloat64(number), 0.)]], number % 64 FROM numbers(20000)
test.query: SELECT groupPolygonUnion(poly) FROM bench_polygon_union FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT group_id, groupPolygonUnion(poly) FROM bench_polygon_union GROUP BY group_id FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1
